response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep exposure to TypeScript, cloud infrastructure (AWS), and open-source AI-agent tooling, including MCP, which aligns with key requirements; however, he lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI systems, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — critical for a staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Strong cloud and DevOps background with AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes
Demonstrated ability to lead technical initiatives and mentor through workshops and open-source projects
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI/ML systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization techniques
Limited documentation of customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise AI deployment
